tribute.title: Tribute
tribute.description: A message of sympathy or a memory shared by a visitor.

name.description: The name of the person leaving the tribute.

uid.description: The UID of the user who posted it, or 'anonymous' if not logged in.

gallery_item.title: Gallery Item
gallery_item.description: A photo or video shared in memory of André.

url.description: The URL or base64 data of the media.

caption.description: A short description or memory associated with the media.

authorName.description: The name of the person who shared it.

uid.description: The UID of the user who shared it, or 'anonymous' if not logged in.

counter.title: Counter
counter.description: A simple counter for tracking global events like lit candles.

lastUpdated.description: When the counter was last updated.
